verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.preview: Confirm your email to activate your account
verification.body: Thanks for signing up. Please verify your email address by clicking the button below. This link expires in {hours} hours and can only be used once.
verification.fallback: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verification.ignore: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
